Rhiannon Payne

I'm a San Francisco-based entrepreneur, startup consultant, writer, speaker, & adventurer. In 2017 I founded Sea Foam Media & Tech to help startups tell their stories & build useful products. I am passionate about The New Distributed Workforce, with a book to be published in 2020.
